chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling

text: 3529 - وَ رَوَى عَنْبَسَةُ بْنُ مُصْعَبٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لَهُ جَارِيَةٌ لِي زَنَتْ أَبِيعُ وَلَدَهَا قَالَ "نَعَمْ" قُلْتُ أَحُجُّ بِثَمَنِهِ قَالَ "نَعَمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3529 - It is narrated from Anbasa ibn Mus'ab that he said:
"I said to Abu Abdullah (as): 'A bondwoman of mine committed adultery. Can I sell her child?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.'
I said: 'Can I perform Hajj with its price?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.' "
